name: kanban-for-agent
description: Kanban full-stack application for syncing human and agent work progress

scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "green,blue" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.install: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run copy:frontend && cd backend && npm run start
scripts.test:unit: cd frontend && npm run test:unit && cd ../backend && npm run test:unit && cd ../kanban-cli && npm test
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
